---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve, or what use case does it enable?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to happen. Be as specific as you can.

## Affected component

- [ ] Node.js backend (`src/`)
- [ ] Electron HUD (`electron/`)
- [ ] Python transcriber (`transcriber/`)
- [ ] AI provider / prompts
- [ ] Settings UI
- [ ] Startup / `start.sh`
- [ ] Other

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you've thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Screenshots, links, or references that help illustrate the request.
